subcodes.first_line: In this day the friends of God must speak with wisdom and make mention of that which is befitting. The All-Knowing beareth witness that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم باید دوستان الهی بحکمت ناطق باشند و بما ینبغی ذاکر حق آگاه گواهست که
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @universality of the Cause, @education of children; moral education, @station of the Manifestation of God, @methods of teaching the Cause, @the power of words; of speech
